testcase.name: test_excel_seed_already_running_or_starts

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_excel_seed_products.py:130: in test_excel_seed_already_running_or_starts assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_endpoints_reject_unauthenticated

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 502 assert 502 in [401, 403, 422] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_excel_seed_products.py:141: in test_admin_endpoints_reject_unauthenticated assert resp.status_code in [401, 403, 422], f"Expected auth error, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 502 E assert 502 in [401, 403, 422] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
